topic: My car radio only finds a station reading numbers; last night it read my license plate.
title: My Car Radio Read My License Plate Out Loud | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My car radio only finds one station, and it reads numbers aloud.
scenes.image_prompt: a car radio dial glowing in the dark, a single frequency locked in, dim dashboard light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It started on my long drive home from the coast.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty highway at night through a windshield, headlights and road lines, fog, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every other station was only dead air.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand turning a radio tuning knob, static bars on the display, dark car interior, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The voice read long strings of numbers, slow and flat.
scenes.image_prompt: a glowing car stereo with a faint sound wave, dim cabin, deep shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then the numbers became my phone number.
scenes.image_prompt: a car dashboard at night, faint phone resting in a cup holder, dim glow, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then my date of birth, digit by digit.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark car interior lit only by the radio display, empty road ahead through glass, fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I pulled over and turned the car off completely.
scenes.image_prompt: a car stopped on a gravel shoulder at night, hazard lights faint, surrounding darkness, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The radio kept reading, even with the engine dead.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark dashboard with a still-glowing radio and no ignition light, deep shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the voice read my license plate, slow and clear.
scenes.image_prompt: a rear license plate lit by red tail lights on a dark road, fog, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then it said it was right behind me.
scenes.image_prompt: a rearview mirror reflecting empty dark road and faint distant headlights, dim cabin, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sold the car the next day to anyone who would take it.
scenes.image_prompt: a car parked under a dim streetlight with a for sale sign in the window, fog, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My new car found the same station the moment I started it.
scenes.image_prompt: a different car dashboard at night with the same lone frequency glowing, deep shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
